ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin McInnis in Propria Persona.

Mr. McInnis informed the Court that he filed a Petition for Final Distribution this morning with a hearing date of June 12, 2012. In addition, Mr. McInnis stated that he was willing to accept sanctions voluntarily and that he waived any commissions. The Court suspended impositions of any sanctions and took today's matters off calendar.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Continued To Apr-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Kevin McInnis (Administrator in Propria Persona) to appear on April 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution or a Status Report has not been filed. Sanctions in amount of $25.00 per day are imposed against Mr. McInnis and begin to run as of today. Status on administration of the Estate was also continued to April 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Continued To Mar-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin McInnis in Propria Persona.

Mr. McInnis stated that he has not heard from the Probate Referee, requested a 21 to 30-day continuance to complete the petition for final distribution and stated that he would seek Counsel if he is unable to complete the process. Status of closing estate was continued to March 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will begin to run everyday thereafter that the petition for final distibution is not filed.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Continued To Jan-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
